autonomy.description: Output gate. Validation doesn't gate on autonomy itself; it's accepted as part of the request body so the same payload works for automl-create.

config.description: Task-type-specific configuration to validate. Classification expects target_event + horizon_days. Regression expects target_expression + horizon_days. Forecasting expects series_expression + grain + horizon_steps. Clustering accepts cluster_count.

inference_cadence.description: How often inference runs. Used to project daily prediction event volume against the inference population size.

inference_population.description: Population definition used to estimate events-per-day output. Same kind="hogql" constraint as training_population.

name.description: Human-readable label for the pipeline (only used by structural checks like output property name conventions). Use the same value you intend to pass to automl-create.

output_property_name.description: Property name predictions are written to. Validation checks the naming convention (recommended "automl_" prefix; reserved "$" prefix is blocked).

retraining_cadence.description: How often the model is refit. Compared against inference_cadence — info finding when retraining is more frequent than inference.

task_type.description: Task type the pipeline targets. Validation rules dispatch on this — classification runs the positive base-rate check, forecasting counts distinct series, clustering sanity-checks cluster_count against training-set size.

training_population.description: Population definition to size for training. Only kind="hogql" populations are sized by data-touching checks; other shapes are accepted but flagged as not-counted.
